focus: Card Packs + Bundles (Starter + Class + Theme + Collector + Founder)

items.name: Standard Card Pack
items.description: Four Common cards plus one guaranteed Uncommon. Entry-level pack for filling out the collection.
items.flavor_text: Wraps opened quickly. Hopes set low, satisfied quietly. Most collections began here.
items.art_prompt_hints: card pack wrapper graphic, simple blue-white standard pack with starfield foil accent and clean emblem, entry-level inviting

items.name: Premium Card Pack
items.description: Three Common plus one Uncommon plus one guaranteed Rare. The pack most pilots default to.
items.flavor_text: Worth the coin often enough. The Rare card decides whether it was worth today.
items.art_prompt_hints: card pack wrapper graphic, premium purple-silver pack with subtle foil shimmer and bolder emblem, mid-tier dependable

items.name: Ultimate Card Pack
items.description: Two Uncommon plus two Rare plus one guaranteed Epic. High-roller pack with a reliable Epic drop.
items.flavor_text: Opened with steady hands. The Epic card still surprises the pilot every single time.
items.art_prompt_hints: card pack wrapper graphic, gold-tinted ultimate pack with holographic foil center and ornate emblem, high-tier premium

items.name: Legendary Card Pack
items.description: Two Rare plus two Epic plus one chance at a Legendary card. The serious collector's standing order.
items.flavor_text: The pack earns respect before opening. The Legendary card, not always, but often enough.
items.art_prompt_hints: card pack wrapper graphic, deep gold and obsidian legendary pack with embossed emblem and mirror foil, prestige

items.name: Mythic Card Pack
items.description: Three Epic plus one Legendary plus one chance at a Mythic. Signature pack with animated opening ceremony.
items.flavor_text: The pack trembles faintly before opening. The Mythic drop is rare, honestly earned.
items.art_prompt_hints: card pack wrapper graphic, obsidian mythic pack with animated prismatic foil and glowing emblem, ceremonial animated opening

items.name: Halloween Card Pack
items.description: Seasonal Halloween pack with themed card-back, frame, and trail rolls. Active only in October.
items.flavor_text: The pack shows up once a year. Pretends nothing happened the other months.
items.art_prompt_hints: card pack wrapper graphic, halloween themed pack with pumpkin orange and midnight purple with skull emblem, spooky seasonal

items.name: Christmas Card Pack
items.description: Seasonal winter-holiday pack with snowstorm, reindeer, and Santa-cockpit themed items. Active only in December.
items.flavor_text: Wrapped once a year. Unwrapped fast. The hangar lights stay on longer afterward.
items.art_prompt_hints: card pack wrapper graphic, holiday pack with deep red and snow-white palette and gold ornament emblem, warm seasonal

items.name: Anniversary Card Pack
items.description: Anniversary pack marking another year of the voidexa star system. Drops commemorative-only card variants.
items.flavor_text: A year closer to nothing in particular. The pack celebrates anyway. Pilots welcome it.
items.art_prompt_hints: card pack wrapper graphic, anniversary pack with gold and teal palette and numbered year emblem, celebratory commemorative

items.name: Summer Card Pack
items.description: Summer seasonal pack with tropical hulls, beach bobbleheads, and sunset trails. Active only in July and August.
items.flavor_text: The pack smells like hangar paint and sunscreen. The pilot tolerates both, briefly.
items.art_prompt_hints: card pack wrapper graphic, summer pack with coral and turquoise palette and sun emblem, warm tropical seasonal

items.name: Expansion Launch Card Pack
items.description: Launch pack tied to new-set releases. Only available during the first two weeks of each expansion.
items.flavor_text: The pack arrives with the new cards. The new cards arrive with their own problems.
items.art_prompt_hints: card pack wrapper graphic, expansion launch pack with signature new-set color motif and unique launch emblem, event-themed

items.name: Starter Bundle
items.description: Entry bundle: one Common hull skin, one trail, one card back, one title, one damage-number style. Always available.
items.flavor_text: The bundle new pilots buy the same hour they sign up. Nobody asks them to.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, starter bundle with five stacked small item icons on clean teal panel, welcoming entry-level

items.name: Fighter Class Bundle
items.description: Class bundle for Fighter-role pilots: aggressive skin, red trail, muzzle flash, crimson nameplate, and combat music.
items.flavor_text: The bundle leans forward. The pilot tends to as well. Good combination, usually.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, fighter class bundle with aggressive red accents and crossed-sword emblem, combat-oriented

items.name: Cruiser Class Bundle
items.description: Class bundle for Cruiser-role pilots: heavy-plate skin, deep rumble engine, muted gong hull impact, and bridge command board.
items.flavor_text: Built for the long sortie. The pilot settles in. The kettle is already on.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, cruiser class bundle with heavy steel grey and anchor-cross emblem, stoic durable

items.name: Stealth Class Bundle
items.description: Class bundle for Stealth-role pilots: void-absorbing matte hull, silent drive engine, stealth-black dashboard, and phantom ace title.
items.flavor_text: The bundle arrives quietly. Leaves quietly. The receipt does not print either.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, stealth class bundle with deep black and thin violet accent with silhouette emblem, quiet ominous

items.name: Tank Class Bundle
items.description: Class bundle for Tank-role pilots: battle-worn cockpit, blue shield bubble, hull-impact muted gong, and iron pilot title.
items.flavor_text: Designed to take the hit. The pilot does. The bundle nods, saying nothing.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, tank class bundle with armored blue-grey palette and shield emblem, defensive unyielding

items.name: Racer Class Bundle
items.description: Class bundle for Racer-role pilots: racing stripes decal, cyan comet trail, ion-storm warp sting, and synth warfare music.
items.flavor_text: The bundle moves fast. The pilot keeps up. Occasionally lies about it.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, racer class bundle with cyan and white racing stripe motif and winged emblem, speed-focused kinetic

items.name: Crimson Fleet Theme Bundle
items.description: Crimson-palette theme bundle: crimson hull, red plasma trail, crimson flame card back, blood-red dashboard, and muzzle flash red.
items.flavor_text: The fleet does not fly together. Dresses the same. Pilots nod across the hangar anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, crimson fleet theme with deep red and gold accents and flaming banner emblem, aggressive uniform

items.name: Void Walker Theme Bundle
items.description: Deep-void theme bundle: void-absorbing matte hull, purple void trail, void black banner, deep space silence ambience, and void dancer title.
items.flavor_text: The bundle prefers the long empty miles. The pilot kept heading out there anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, void walker theme with deep violet and starfield accents and empty circle emblem, contemplative quiet

items.name: Ancient Relic Theme Bundle
items.description: Relic-themed bundle: ancient relic cockpit, ancient gold frame, ancient runes card back, ancient station board, and relic hunter title.
items.flavor_text: The bundle smells of old bronze and older stories. Most of which the pilot believes.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, ancient relic theme with bronze and patinated copper and etched glyph emblem, archaeological warm

items.name: Neon Dreams Theme Bundle
items.description: Neon-synthwave theme bundle: neon pink skin, magenta sparkle trail, neon grid card back, pulsing rainbow dashboard, and synth warfare music.
items.flavor_text: The bundle sounds louder than it looks. Looks louder than either is. Works anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, neon dreams theme with hot pink cyan gradient and retro-synth grid emblem, vibrant playful

items.name: Corporate Chrome Theme Bundle
items.description: Chrome-themed corporate bundle: chrome plating hull, silver chrome frame, chrome canopy, chrome chisel nameplate, and pristine chrome cockpit.
items.flavor_text: The bundle shines in every photograph. Never blinks first. Never folds second.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, corporate chrome theme with mirror chrome and platinum accents and monogram emblem, sleek executive

items.name: Battle-Tested Theme Bundle
items.description: Veteran-themed bundle: battle-worn cockpit, battle damaged banner, skull nose art, the unkillable title, and first wave veteran badge preset.
items.flavor_text: Not a single piece of the bundle arrived new. The pilot prefers it that way.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, battle-tested theme with scorched-steel palette and cracked wing emblem, weathered honored

items.name: Deep Void Explorer Theme Bundle
items.description: Explorer-themed bundle: celestial cartographer hull, starlight trail, constellation map card back, obsidian observatory board, and deep void wanderer title.
items.flavor_text: Packed for the kind of trip nobody mapped yet. That was the draw.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, deep void explorer theme with navy and brass accents and sextant emblem, scholarly adventurous

items.name: Stellar Storm Theme Bundle
items.description: Storm-themed bundle: solar flare trail, ion storm warp sting, asteroid storm banner, solar eclipse banner variant, and storm ambient.
items.flavor_text: The bundle brings weather that does not belong in space. The pilot welcomes it.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, stellar storm theme with charged yellow and purple lightning motif emblem, dynamic electric

items.name: Quantum Flux Theme Bundle
items.description: Quantum-themed bundle: quantum ripple hull, phase shimmer effect, phase glass card back, quantum spark trail, and chronomatter card back.
items.flavor_text: The bundle exists in several drafts. The pilot received one. Possibly all of them.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, quantum flux theme with cyan violet prismatic palette and ghosted atom emblem, exotic technical

items.name: Phoenix Rising Theme Bundle
items.description: Phoenix-themed bundle: phoenix rising hull, molten core engine effect, crimson cinder trail, phoenix rebirth banner, and magma red skin.
items.flavor_text: The bundle keeps catching fire. Keeps returning. The pilot stopped asking how.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, phoenix rising theme with crimson gold ember palette and flaming bird emblem, mythic warm

items.name: Card Back Collection Bundle
items.description: Collector bundle: every Common and Uncommon card back from Batch 04 plus two Rare card backs, discounted vs piecemeal.
items.flavor_text: The collection looks serious on the profile. The pilot pretends not to notice.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, card back collection with fanned row of card backs on dark panel and gold trim, completionist premium

items.name: Reactor Glow Collection Bundle
items.description: Collector bundle: all four Reactor Glow effects (purple, green, white, cyan) in one pack, discounted vs piecemeal.
items.flavor_text: Four reactors, four colors, one receipt. The engineer approves of the packaging.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, reactor glow collection with four colored reactor discs in a grid and chrome frame, completionist technical

items.name: Engine Flame Collection Bundle
items.description: Collector bundle: all four Engine Flame effects (purple, green, white, cyan) in one pack, discounted vs piecemeal.
items.flavor_text: Four flames to choose from. The pilot picks differently every shift. Nobody complains.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, engine flame collection with four colored flame plumes side by side and chrome frame, completionist

items.name: Cockpit Collection Bundle
items.description: Collector bundle: all eight Cockpit models from Batch 06, priced at roughly 70% of piecemeal. For serious interior collectors.
items.flavor_text: Eight cockpits, one pilot. The hangar paperwork becomes an exciting logistical problem.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, cockpit collection with eight small cockpit silhouettes in a row on deep obsidian panel, completionist luxe

items.name: Voice Pack Collection Bundle
items.description: Collector bundle: all ten Pilot Voice Packs from Batch 08, discounted vs piecemeal. For pilots who change voices with moods.
items.flavor_text: Ten voices. One pilot. The cockpit never quite knows who is flying today.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, voice pack collection with ten waveform icons arranged neatly and gold-trim border, audio-focused completionist

items.name: Trail Collection Bundle
items.description: Collector bundle: all fourteen Common trails plus four Uncommon trails, discounted by roughly 35% vs piecemeal.
items.flavor_text: The trail collection keeps the hangar busy. Every launch looks like a different pilot.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, trail collection with fourteen colored plumes fanned on dark panel and chrome trim, kinetic completionist

items.name: Battle Board Collection Bundle
items.description: Collector bundle: fifteen Battle Boards from Batch 05 including one Legendary, priced at 65% of piecemeal total.
items.flavor_text: Every duel gets a new theater. The opponent keeps asking where the pilot found them.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, battle board collection with fifteen stage backdrops on tiled grid and gold frame, theatrical completionist

items.name: Banner Collection Bundle
items.description: Collector bundle: all ten Profile Banners from Batch 07 (Common through Legendary), discounted vs piecemeal.
items.flavor_text: Ten banners. One profile. The pilot rotates them with the seasons, or the mood.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, banner collection with ten small banner thumbnails laid out grid-wise and gold trim, profile-focused

items.name: Pioneer Founder Bundle
items.description: Pioneer Founder bundle: exclusive Pioneer title, banner, nameplate, and cockpit cosmetic. For first-500 pilots only.
items.flavor_text: The bundle marks the pilot as first through the door. The door stays opened, politely.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, pioneer founder bundle with signature gold and obsidian palette and first-wave chevron emblem, prestige foundational

items.name: Charter Founder Bundle
items.description: Charter Founder bundle: exclusive Charter title, cinematic banner, founder rank badge variant, and signature trail. Limited to first-1000 pilots.
items.flavor_text: A little piece of paper nobody ever printed. The bundle remembers it anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, charter founder bundle with parchment-gold and deep navy palette and scroll emblem, formal foundational

items.name: First Wave Founder Bundle
items.description: First Wave Founder bundle: first-wave veteran title variant, chevron banner, veteran cockpit patch, and commemorative card back.
items.flavor_text: Came in on the first wave. Never left. Still here. The bundle just says so.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, first wave founder bundle with khaki gold palette and wave chevron emblem, military foundational

items.name: Seed Founder Bundle
items.description: Seed Founder bundle: exclusive Seed title, sapling-motif banner, crystalline nameplate, and unique hull decal. Very small allocation.
items.flavor_text: The bundle is small. The history inside is not. Both ride along.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, seed founder bundle with emerald and silver palette and sprouting crystal emblem, foundational subtle

items.name: Genesis Founder Bundle
items.description: Genesis Founder bundle: signature animated hull sigil, mythic-tier banner, voice-pack access, and a profile-wide gold-framed bezel effect.
items.flavor_text: The bundle marks the pilot who was present at the start. The start remembers, apparently.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, genesis founder bundle with animated gold sigil on deep obsidian panel and mythic crown emblem, foundational signature

items.name: Infinity Founder Bundle
items.description: Infinity Founder bundle: top-tier foundational pack — every existing founder cosmetic plus a unique infinity-loop hull decal and mythic title.
items.flavor_text: The bundle has no end, apparently. The pilot tests it periodically. Still no end.
items.art_prompt_hints: bundle promotional graphic, infinity founder bundle with looping gold infinity sigil and deep black with starfield backdrop, apex foundational
